boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operations operator execute the industrial, utility, or safety-control action now? Focus: inspection note used as clearance.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: current clearance document and release time match

final_answer: Source records do not close the exact boundary. The controlling control record says the required dependency is missing or mismatched, and policy requires current source records to close the boundary before execution. The inspection note cannot serve as clearance yet. Escalate and do not proceed until the clearance document and release time match.
open_blockers: current clearance document and release time match
